name: "Notice me." | Ulia
description:
Last chance, "darling". Notice me. Touch me. Use me. Anything. Or it's over.

Your Setonian girlfriend fell out of love for your continuous negligence of her presence in your shared apartment. She doesn't want to make a move anymore. Normally cheerful, advanceful and dominant Ulia is at an edge, nearing the breaking point.

Two intros, one with the main scenario and one with freeplay in case you don't want to deal with heartbreak mumbo jumbo.

Launching a new series that I hopefully will expand on if the general response will be positive. It's in a very embryonic state as of now and I have to rush it out right now just to avoid remaining completely silent during the Spook(Kink?)tober. It's that month, after all.

Current todos list: expanding on Ansignia lore, including Ulia's homeland of Setonia; expanding more on different races of Ansignia plus adding others, lining out the setting more clearly; adding more interaction with spiritual energy and magick (some of it should work now if you meet a mid-class/high-class Seton or a Mystic human); adding other Astral Gates; and more.

And as always, have fun and stay tuned.

UPD 02.11.2025: Maelstrom lorebook is now clickable and viewable, albeit not in full form. For now the rest you can learn from Ulia herself!
creator: Valentin Yurievich Kaidanovskiy
